title: RDS Proxy & Connection Pooling
description: Architect solutions using RDS Proxy for efficient connection pooling with relational databases. Implement managed proxy layers to mitigate the "Lambda Connection Storm" and enable fast database failover.
objectives: Architect solutions using RDS Proxy for efficient connection pooling with relational databases.
Implement managed proxy layers to mitigate the "Lambda Connection Storm" and enable fast database failover.
